violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of brown/black residue. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance and to the side of the kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance and to the side of the kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2024

Ambient temperature of Russell 1-door reach-in was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Butter in this unit observed with temperature of 47 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Reach-in unit was placed out of service and is not to be used to store TCS foods until it is serviced and maintaining a temperature at/below 41 degrees F. Voluntary disposal during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance and to the side of the kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2024

Working containers of dry ingredient are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023

Ice dispenser located in the Russell area is not in good repair. It is no longer able to be cleaned properly where drainage occurs. Machine is to be properly repaired or replaced. In addition, dishwasher in the main kitchen is in poor repair. Water is periodically leaking from pipes behind the unit. A temporary steel "ramp" has been placed from pipe area to the floor drain. Dishwasher must be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023
